events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need output exactly one valid JSON object. Need assess field condition. Scenario: gauge shown near spool erection & fit-up, needle and scale out of focus. Work order references a limit, yet no readable value or second measurement provided. References ASME B31.3, project iso drawings.

We need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since no readable value, cannot verify within tolerance. So needs_more_info. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions none flagged, no applicable categories? Maybe installed-defective? No evidence. Empty list. Percent complete rough-complete maybe 70. value 0. confidence maybe low. risk? Maybe medium because unverified fit-up could be non-compliant. Findings: gauge image out of focus, no readable measurement; missing second verification; cannot confirm tolerance compliance. Actions: retake focused gauge photo, obtain readable measurement, compare to work order limit/project spec, verify with calibrated gauge, document. Rationale: tolerances cannot be verified without legible measurement; per ASME B31.3 and iso dims, fit-up must be measured and within limits. references: ASME B31.3, project iso drawings. Also response_format raw JSON. Ensure no extra. Use exact schema.

Need decide if dangerous/non-compliant => fail. But we don't know non-compliant; just insufficient info. Not necessarily dangerous. So needs_more_info.

Need include all fields. component_conditions may be empty list. sound_source etc default strings? Schema says sound_source source when asked; here not audio/video; can use "" or "N/A". Use empty string. event_time 0.0 rate 0.0. order empty list. workable empty list.

confidence: 0.4 maybe. percent_complete: 70.

risk: medium because heavy industrial piping fit-up out-of-tolerance can affect weld integrity / stress. But since unknown, medium.

Let's craft JSON with double quotes. No comments.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision": "needs_more_info", "risk": "medium", "work_stage": "rough-complete", "component_conditions": [], "percent_complete": 70, "value": 0, "sound_source": "", "confidence": 0.4, "event_time": 0, "rate": 0, "order": [], "workable": [], "findings": ["Gauge face/needle is out of focus and no readable value can be obtained", "No second independent measurement or recorded value is provided for comparison", "Cannot confirm spool fit-up is within the work-order tolerance"], "actions": ["Retake the gauge reading with the scale and needle in clear focus", "Record the measured value and the work-order limit on the photo or inspection form", "Verify with a calibrated instrument and compare to project iso drawing / spec tolerance", "Do not close out fit-up until a legible, within-tolerance measurement is documented"], "rationale": "ASME B31.3 and project iso drawings require spool fit-up dimensions to be measured and within specified tolerances. Because the gauge reading is unreadable and no alternate measurement is supplied, compliance cannot be confirmed; more information is required before acceptance.", "references": ["ASME B31.3", "project iso drawings"]}
